name: law firm accountants processing 5–15 legal case invoices/month tool
description: For law firm accountants processing 5–15 invoices/month, inefficient preparation causes delays in tax filing. We automate tax deduction summaries instead of manual preparation of tax deduction summaries.
target_audience: law firm accountants processing 5–15 legal case invoices/month
problem_solved: Inefficient preparation of tax deduction summaries from legal case expenses.
features: manual entry of legal case expenses
